import json, re, pandas as pd

businesses = var_call_ksm6vCgVick6sd3dUCMIVUtj

def extract_state(desc: str):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = re.search(r",\s*([A-Z]{2})\b", desc)
    if m:
        return m.group(1)
    return None

df = pd.DataFrame([{'business_id': b['business_id'], 'state': extract_state(b.get('description',''))} for b in businesses])
df = df.dropna(subset=['state'])
state_counts = df.groupby('state')['business_id'].nunique().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state = state_counts.index[0]
top_ids = df[df.state==top_state].business_id.unique().tolist()
top_refs = [bid.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_', 1) for bid in top_ids]
out = {'top_state': top_state, 'wifi_business_count': int(state_counts.iloc[0]), 'top_refs': top_refs}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

val_args.code:
import json, re, pandas as pd

businesses = var_call_ksm6vCgVick6sd3dUCMIVUtj

def extract_state(desc: str):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = re.search(r",\s*([A-Z]{2})\b", desc)
    if m:
        return m.group(1)
    return None

df = pd.DataFrame([{'business_id': b['business_id'], 'state': extract_state(b.get('description',''))} for b in businesses])
df = df.dropna(subset=['state'])
state_counts = df.groupby('state')['business_id'].nunique().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state = state_counts.index[0]
top_ids = df[df.state==top_state].business_id.unique().tolist()
top_refs = [bid.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_', 1) for bid in top_ids]
out = {'top_state': top_state, 'wifi_business_count': int(state_counts.iloc[0]), 'top_refs': top_refs}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

import json, re, pandas as pd
businesses = var_call_ksm6vCgVick6sd3dUCMIVUtj

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc,str):
        return None
    m=re.search(r" in [^,]+,\s*([A-Z]{2}),\s*this\b", desc)
    return m.group(1) if m else None

df=pd.DataFrame([{'business_id':b['business_id'],'state':extract_state(b.get('description',''))} for b in businesses])
df=df.dropna(subset=['state'])
state_counts=df.groupby('state')['business_id'].nunique().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state=state_counts.index[0]
top_ids=df[df.state==top_state].business_id.unique().tolist()
top_refs=[bid.replace('businessid_','businessref_',1) for bid in top_ids]
out={'top_state':top_state,'wifi_business_count':int(state_counts.iloc[0]),'top_refs':top_refs}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

args.code:
import json, re, pandas as pd
businesses = var_call_ksm6vCgVick6sd3dUCMIVUtj
valid=set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc,str):
        return None
    tokens=re.findall(r"\b[A-Z]{2}\b", desc)
    for t in tokens:
        if t in valid:
            return t
    return None

df=pd.DataFrame([{'business_id':b.get('business_id'),'state':extract_state(b.get('description',''))} for b in businesses])
df=df.dropna(subset=['business_id','state'])
state_counts=df.groupby('state')['business_id'].nunique().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state=state_counts.index[0]
top_ids=df[df.state==top_state].business_id.unique().tolist()
top_refs=[bid.replace('businessid_','businessref_',1) for bid in top_ids]
out={'top_state':top_state,'wifi_business_count':int(state_counts.iloc[0]),'top_refs':top_refs}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

import json, re, pandas as pd
path = var_call_usxLedXKbcLY9qr0caZyuBDl
with open(path,'r') as f:
    businesses=json.load(f)
valid=set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc,str):
        return None
    tokens=re.findall(r"\b[A-Z]{2}\b", desc)
    for t in tokens:
        if t in valid:
            return t
    return None

df=pd.DataFrame([{'business_id':b.get('business_id'),'state':extract_state(b.get('description',''))} for b in businesses])
df=df.dropna(subset=['business_id','state'])
state_counts=df.groupby('state')['business_id'].nunique().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state=state_counts.index[0]
count=int(state_counts.iloc[0])
top_ids=df[df.state==top_state].business_id.unique().tolist()
top_refs=[bid.replace('businessid_','businessref_',1) for bid in top_ids]
out={'top_state':top_state,'wifi_business_count':count,'top_refs':top_refs}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

import json, re, pandas as pd
path = var_call_usxLedXKbcLY9qr0caZyuBDl
with open(path,'r') as f:
    businesses=json.load(f)
valid=set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc,str):
        return None
    tokens=re.findall(r"[A-Z]{2}", desc)
    for t in tokens:
        if t in valid:
            return t
    return None

df=pd.DataFrame([{'business_id':b.get('business_id'),'state':extract_state(b.get('description',''))} for b in businesses])
df=df.dropna(subset=['business_id','state'])
state_counts=df.groupby('state')['business_id'].nunique().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state=state_counts.index[0]
count=int(state_counts.iloc[0])
top_ids=df[df.state==top_state].business_id.unique().tolist()
top_refs=[bid.replace('businessid_','businessref_',1) for bid in top_ids]
out={'top_state':top_state,'wifi_business_count':count,'top_refs':top_refs}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))
